steps.text: Sit upright. Let the shoulders drop. Nothing to fix—only notice.

steps.lead: Read in short phrases. Tap when you have taken the line in.

steps.prompt: What is outside your control right now? Name one thing you can do well anyway.

steps.text: Steady attention. When the mind rushes to verdict, we pause.

steps.lead: Each line is enough. Advance when the words have landed.

steps.prompt: Separate one fact from the story you told about it.

steps.text: Let the day thin out. No inventory of faults—only proportion.

steps.lead: Read as if someone kind were speaking to you.

steps.prompt: What would you drop if you were not afraid of being misunderstood?
